sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n78113" key="parakatazeu/gnumi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρακατα-ζεύγνῡμι</orth>, <sense id="n78113.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">add besides</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὄρχησιν καὶ ῥυθμόν</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diotog.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.1.96</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
